fields.description: A list of slots with the chance to drop an equipped item from that slot. Can be an array of slot name strings or an array of objects with slot and drop_chance properties.

fields.title: Drop Chance
fields.description: The chance to drop the equipped item (0.0 to 1.0).

fields.title: Slot Drop Chance
